title: Fluffy Crumbled Feta Cheese
description: This malaysian dish features fluffy crumbled feta cheese that has been caramelized for a high-protein-friendly snack or side.
instructions: Place feta cheese cubes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Melt unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Once melted, remove from heat and pour evenly over the feta cheese.
Sprinkle pinch of salt over the feta cheese mixture.
Bake for 10 minutes or until edges are golden brown and caramelized.
Let cool slightly before crumbling with your fingers.
